sql_array: CREATE TABLE PhraseSets (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(255), OwnerID INT, ReaderGID INT, APCID INT, LangName VARCHAR(50), AppEnv VARCHAR(255), Size INT);
INSERT INTO PhraseSets (ID, Name, OwnerID, ReaderGID, APCID, LangName, AppEnv, Size) VALUES (1, 'Test Set', 1001, 2001, 3, 'en-US', 'Production', 5000);
INSERT INTO PhraseSets (ID, Name, OwnerID, ReaderGID, APCID, LangName, AppEnv, Size) VALUES (2, 'Debug Set', 1002, 2002, 3, 'en-US', 'Development', 10000);
SELECT ID, Name FROM PhraseSets WHERE Size > 4000 AND (OwnerID = 1001 OR ReaderGID = 2002);
SELECT ID, Name FROM PhraseSets WHERE Size = (SELECT MAX(Size) FROM PhraseSets) AND NOT (Name IS NULL);
SELECT APS_ID FROM DB.DBA.SYS_ANN_PHRASE_SET WHERE APS_SIZE IN (SELECT Size FROM PhraseSets WHERE Size > 8000 AND Size < 12000);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PhraseSets GROUP BY OwnerID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT APS_ID, APS_NAME FROM DB.DBA.SYS_ANN_PHRASE_SET WHERE APS_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM PhraseSets WHERE ID = 1 AND (Name LIKE '%Set' AND Size < 6000));
AP_ADD_PHRASES(1, vector(vector('Testing1', 'Env1'), vector('Testing2', NULL), vector('Edge Case Test', 'Edge Case Env')));
SELECT APS_ID, APS_NAME FROM DB.DBA.SYS_ANN_PHRASE_SET WHERE APS_ID = 1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PhraseSets WHERE ID = APS_ID) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT APS_ID FROM DB.DBA.SYS_ANN_PHRASE_SET WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PhraseSets WHERE Name IS NOT NULL AND ID = APS_ID);
SELECT ID FROM PhraseSets WHERE ID = (SELECT MAX(ID) FROM PhraseSets WHERE ID < 3) AND Name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT APS_ID FROM DB.DBA.SYS_ANN_PHRASE_SET WHERE APS_ID <> (SELECT AVG(ID) FROM PhraseSets WHERE Size > 10000) AND APS_SIZE IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sum(Size) as TotalSize FROM PhraseSets WHERE ReaderGID IN (SELECT DISTINCT ReaderGID FROM PhraseSets HAVING COUNT(*) > 0) AND Name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT APS_ID FROM DB.DBA.SYS_ANN_PHRASE_SET WHERE APS_ID >= 1 AND APS_ID <= (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PhraseSets);
